items.title: Brides are bringing back the one-night-only bachelorette party: 'You just come, have one perfect night and leave'
items.summary: Before they ballooned into multi-day destination getaways, bachelorette parties tended to be one night of raucous fun. Some brides are bringing it back.

items.title: Cargo vessel in Red Sea reports coming under attack, UK maritime body says
items.summary: The incident was reported in one of the world's most crucial trade transit routes amid a fragile ceasefire between Iran and the U.S.
